overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through Night City in a luxury futuristic vehicle. The journey begins on an elevated highway passing industrial smokestacks and transitions into the dense downtown core with towering skyscrapers and neon signage.

agents.ego_description: driving straight on elevated highway at high speed toward industrial smokestacks in the distance

entered.detail: multi-lane elevated roadway with futuristic barrier rails
futuristic luxury car interior with illuminated central console and speedometer
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke on the horizon
tall modern glass building with reflective windows
industrial complex with multiple structures and smokestacks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from inside a futuristic luxury vehicle driving on an elevated highway. The industrial district lies ahead with prominent smokestacks visible in the distance against an overcast sky. The car maintains a steady high speed as it approaches the industrial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway passing industrial complex with smokestacks

events.description: vehicle passes large industrial smokestacks emitting thick white smoke on the left side

agents.ego_description: maintaining high speed while passing the industrial zone with smokestacks visible to the left

entered.detail: large hyperboloid cooling towers part of the industrial complex
dense industrial buildings with pipes and structures
white smoke emissions from industrial chimneys

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the elevated highway passing directly alongside the industrial complex. Large smokestacks and cooling towers dominate the left side of the view with visible emissions. Downtown skyscrapers begin to appear in the far right distance as the industrial zone starts to recede.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving elevated highway transitioning from industrial to downtown

events.description: industrial area exits view as downtown skyscrapers come into focus ahead
vehicle navigates a pronounced right curve on the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: steering through a right curve while transitioning from the industrial district into the downtown area

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings with glass facades
illuminated vertical signage on building facades
steam emissions rising from street level vents

segments.scene_description: The vehicle executes a right curve on the elevated highway, leaving the industrial smokestacks behind and entering the downtown district. The skyline transitions to dense futuristic skyscrapers with visible neon signage. Steam vents rise from the streets below as the urban canyon begins to enclose the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown urban canyon with towering mega-structures

events.description: entering dense urban canyon with steam vents and large neon advertisements on building sides

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the dense downtown core surrounded by towering mega-structures and neon-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic vehicle driving parallel on the left side of the highway

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper dominating the center of the skyline
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
narrow corridor formed by tall buildings on both sides of the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle driving through the heart of the downtown urban canyon. Massive mega-towers rise on all sides with prominent neon billboards and steam vents creating a dense cyberpunk atmosphere. The highway continues straight through the canyon as the buildings tower overhead, mostly blocking the sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a luxury vehicle as it travels from a bleak industrial periphery toward the distant urban core. It begins on an elevated highway, speeding toward a horizon of prominent smokestacks under a heavy, overcast sky. As the vehicle maintains its pace, the scene shifts to pass directly alongside a massive industrial complex where cooling towers and emissions dominate the left side of the frame. The industrial zone then begins to recede, allowing the first glimpses of towering downtown skyscrapers to emerge in the far right distance.

The shot follows a continuous drive that transitions from an open industrial highway into the claustrophobic depths of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins as the vehicle executes a right curve, leaving industrial smokestacks behind to enter the downtown district where the skyline shifts toward dense futuristic skyscrapers. As the vehicle progresses, the view becomes increasingly enclosed by towering mega-towers and rising steam vents that blur the boundaries of the street. The scene then expands into the heart of the city, driving straight through a corridor of massive buildings and prominent neon billboards. Finally, the urban canyon tightens further, with the overhead structures almost entirely blocking the sky to create a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.
